description: Escape to the enchanting city of Dubrovnik, where history meets breathtaking landscapes and the allure of your favorite series, Game of Thrones. This three-day adventure is designed for families, blending cultural exploration with relaxation and the thrill of discovering iconic filming locations. Stroll through ancient streets, indulge in local delicacies, and immerse yourself in the magic of this Adriatic gem, all while creating unforgettable memories with your loved ones.

days.title: Exploring the Old Town and Game of Thrones Sites

activities.description: Start your day with a delicious breakfast at Café Royal, known for its fresh pastries and local delicacies. Enjoy a leisurely meal while soaking in the charming atmosphere of Dubrovnik's Old Town.

Explore Fort Lovrijenac, a stunning fortress that offers breathtaking views of the Adriatic Sea and the Old Town. This site is famous for its role in 'Game of Thrones' as the Red Keep, and the views from the top are simply spectacular!
Indulge in a gourmet lunch at Restaurant 360, which boasts a Michelin star. Enjoy exquisite dishes made from local ingredients while overlooking the beautiful city walls and the sea.

Take a leisurely walk along Stradun, the main street of Dubrovnik. This vibrant area is lined with shops, cafes, and historical buildings, perfect for picking up some Game of Thrones merchandise and local souvenirs.

Discover the history of Dubrovnik at the Rector's Palace, a beautiful blend of Gothic and Renaissance architecture. The museum inside showcases artifacts and exhibits that tell the story of the city's past.
Unwind at Banje Beach, located just a short walk from the Old Town. Enjoy the sun, sand, and stunning views of the city walls while the kids splash in the water.
End your day with a fine dining experience at Nautika, known for its seafood and stunning views of the Old Town and the sea. A perfect way to relax and reflect on your day's adventures.

days.title: Relaxing at the Beach and Local Culture

activities.description: Start your day with a delicious breakfast at Café Royal, known for its fresh pastries and local specialties. Enjoy a leisurely meal while soaking in the charming atmosphere of Dubrovnik's Old Town.

Head to Banje Beach, one of Dubrovnik's most popular beaches. Relax on the pebbly shore, swim in the crystal-clear waters, or enjoy a refreshing drink at the beach bar. It's a perfect spot for families to unwind and soak up the sun.

Indulge in a luxurious lunch at Restaurant 360, which offers stunning views of the Old Town and the Adriatic Sea. The menu features a blend of Mediterranean and Croatian cuisine, perfect for a special family meal.

Take the cable car up to Srd Hill for breathtaking panoramic views of Dubrovnik and the surrounding islands. There are also walking trails and historical sites to explore, making it a great spot for both relaxation and adventure.

Stroll through the local market where you can find fresh produce, handmade crafts, and unique souvenirs. It's a great place to pick up some Game of Thrones merchandise and local delicacies to take home.
Enjoy a traditional Croatian dinner at Konoba Dubrava, a cozy restaurant known for its local dishes and warm hospitality. The family-friendly atmosphere makes it a perfect end to your day.

Take a leisurely evening stroll through the beautifully lit streets of Dubrovnik's Old Town. The ambiance is magical at night, and you can stop by some shops for last-minute souvenirs or Game of Thrones collectibles.

days.title: Final Day of Adventure and Souvenir Shopping

activities.description: Start your day with a delightful breakfast at Café Royal, known for its fresh pastries and local delicacies. The cozy atmosphere is perfect for families, and the kids will love the sweet treats!
Explore the stunning Rector's Palace, a beautiful blend of Gothic and Renaissance architecture. This historical site offers a glimpse into Dubrovnik's rich past and is a great spot for family photos!
Take a leisurely walk through the iconic Ploče Gate, one of the main entrances to the Old Town. The impressive stonework and surrounding views make it a memorable stop on your adventure.

Enjoy a family-friendly lunch at Restaurant 360, which offers stunning views of the city walls and delicious Mediterranean cuisine. The kids will love the pasta dishes while you savor local seafood specialties.
Head to the Game of Thrones Shop to find unique merchandise and souvenirs from the series. It's a must-visit for fans, and the kids will enjoy picking out their favorite items!
Spend some time relaxing at Banje Beach, just a short walk from the Old Town. The kids can play in the sand while you unwind with a beautiful view of the Adriatic Sea.
End your day with a memorable dinner at Nautika, known for its exquisite seafood and breathtaking views of the sea. It's a perfect way to celebrate your last evening in Dubrovnik with the family!
